title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 302.110 - List of licensed drivers
text:
302.110.  List of licensed drivers. — The director of revenue shall keep a list of all persons who have been licensed to drive a motor vehicle, under sections 302.010 to 302.780, which shall, among other things, contain the date of issue of such license, a description of the licensee and giving his address.
(RSMo 1939 § 8454, A.L. 1961 p. 487, A.L. 1989 1st Ex. Sess. H.B. 3) 
Effective 7-27-89
